prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `070dd51e`.
codex_response:
Implemented `070dd51e` as a new ARC2 task package in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_070dd51e/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_070dd51e/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_070dd51e/generator.py#L1). The rule is: each nonzero color appears twice; same-row pairs become horizontal segments, same-column pairs become vertical segments, and vertical segments overwrite horizontals at crossings. The summary hints matched the official examples, so I used them and did not add `notes.md`. No new shared primitive was needed.

The generator stays close to the observed family: it samples `20x10`, `20x20`, and `30x20` grids, places 4-6 colored endpoint pairs, enforces 2-4 interior crossings, and rejects endpoint-on-line collisions so the sparse seed layout stays consistent with the official task.

Verification passed with `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 070dd51e` (`3/3` official examples). I also rebuilt the artifacts with `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 070dd51e --n-examples 1000`. Generated outputs are in [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/070dd51e/task.json), [examples](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/070dd51e/examples), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/070dd51e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/070dd51e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/070dd51e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/070dd51e/previews/preview_03.png). I could not do a true visual PNG inspection in-terminal because no image renderer was available, but the preview files were produced successfully and the generated JSON examples were spot-checked.
